notes: User reviewed v10: P1C1->P1C2 good; P1C2->P1C3 snaps; P1C3->P1C4 good.
User reviewed v10: P2C1->P2C2 snap-cuts without a fluid slide shot.

User reviewed v10: P3C1->P3C2 is almost correct but cuts a few frames too early; P3C2->P3C3 looks good despite odd source reveal; P3C3 hold should be slightly longer; P3C3->P3C4 and P3C4 hold are good.

reviews.note: P1C2->P1C3: start closer to the real upward slide and extend through the full visible slide to avoid snapping into card 3.
P2C1->P2C2: previous start ended before the fluid slide; use the real slide window from the source sheet.
P3C1->P3C2: user said it cuts a few frames too early; nudge the reveal start later.
P3C3 hold should be slightly longer while preserving the P3C3->P3C4 transition.
